recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure with Scope 3 Emissions Reporting
recommendations.description: Publish a comprehensive ESG report including Scope 3 emissions aligned with TCFD recommendations to improve ESG ratings and attract ESG-mandated foreign institutional investments.
recommendations.profitability_link: Attracting ₹2000-3000 Cr in ESG fund inflows similar to SBI's experience, potentially enhancing valuation by 5-10%, translating to ₹1500-3000 Cr market cap premium.
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India published TCFD report and improved ESG fund inflows by ₹3000 Cr

recommendations.title: Maintain and Expand NSE Sustainability Index Engagement
recommendations.description: Leverage NSE Sustainability recognition by actively engaging with index providers and investors to sustain and grow passive fund inflows, preventing valuation erosion.
recommendations.profitability_link: Sustaining a 20-40 bps lower cost of capital could save ₹50-100 Cr annually in interest expenses.

recommendations.title: Integrate ESG Metrics into Corporate Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Incorporate detailed ESG performance metrics into SEBI quarterly corporate governance reports to enhance transparency and investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved transparency could reduce risk premium by 10 bps, saving ₹25-50 Cr annually in financing costs.

recommendations.title: Prepare for ESRS Compliance for EU Operations
recommendations.description: Initiate processes to comply with ESRS requirements under CSRD for any EU-related operations to avoid regulatory penalties and maintain global ESG credentials.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoid potential penalties and trading restrictions estimated at ₹50 Cr; maintaining market access preserves ₹500 Cr in revenue streams.

immediate_high.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure with Scope 3 Emissions Reporting
